items.name_cn:
Goyard Bohème Hobo~
Goyard HOBO is the ultimate in relaxed style! A minimalist, casual bag perfect for daily commuting. Lightweight and soft, it offers surprisingly spacious capacity to hold all your essentials. Features an extended comfortable leather handle and a shoulder strap long enough for an underarm carry. Includes a detachable pouch—truly a dream bag.
Size:32 cm x 13.5 cm x 34 cm
🔍03687655

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
✈Goyard ♛ Card bag 🏷Essential for daily matching 💳
🔖G0YARD (Goyard) was founded in 1853 and has a history of over 160 years. The fabric is woven from a blend of linen, cotton, and hemp fibers, then coated with glossy shellac, making it waterproof, sturdy, and durable. Highly sought after by celebrities, royalty, and the aristocracy 🎉🎉
Uses exclusive wallet-matching custom glossy leather ✅Perfect diagonal stitching 🧵✅The yellow interior part is custom matching top-grain cowhide [⚠️Not PU leather ❌Not split leather ❌]

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
Goyard (Goyard) has undergone multiple research and improvements, constantly upgrading the fabric and leather. Exclusive customization TM️ is only to constantly meet customers' high-quality requirements 🔝🔝
The base fabric uses high-quality custom rain-dyed hemp consistent with ZP 〽️, coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte 🤟 The leather is [Top-grain South African crushed leather] 👛🤘 Flexible and not prickly 💪 Replaced with matching pure steel hardware 🤓 Matching symmetrical patterns, pure colors with no color difference 😘 Check details in the pictures [Bow] [Bow]
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 19*Base Width 10cm
🔎020181

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
💖 🆕 Goyard Alto Round Box Bag is also a Hat Box Bag 🎩
Alto bag is a highly representative classic hat box bag that combines the essence of Goyard's box-making craftsmanship: Poplar wooden frame, round calfskin handle, closure buckle system, and iconic yellow lining. While appearing small, it has amazing capacity, can hold a mobile phone 📱 keys 🔑 lipstick 💄 small leather goods and other daily items.
The strap is adjustable and detachable, elegant for hand-carry, stylish for shoulder carry, super A and eye-catching 😍
Size: 18*16.5*7cm
🔍020216

items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
Anjou Mini Limited Customization — Coral Pink
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side uses custom high-quality rain-dampened linen consistent with ZP, finished with a glossy resin coating [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte 🤟 The leather is top-grain calfskin 👛 soft and non-irritating 💪 Plus, with custom hand-painting, one bag offers three styles. Includes bag charm, card holder 🎀 ➕ gift box 🎁 ➕ upgraded manual 💌
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660
